title: oenothera prismatica var. gayana
intro: Oenothera prismatica var. gayana, also known as Evening Primrose, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Onagraceae family. The plant is rich in omega-6 fatty acids, specifically gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), which is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oenothera prismatica var. gayana include relief from symptoms of premenstrual syndrome (PMS), menopausal symptoms, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant include oil extracted from its seeds, which can be used as a dietary supplement or applied topically to the skin.
